targets.rawSql: SELECT vehicle_id, name, created_at FROM vehicles
SELECT received_at as time, linear_speed FROM drone_states WHERE vehicle_id = $vehicle_id AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY received_at
SELECT received_at as time, battery_percentage * 100 FROM drone_states WHERE vehicle_id = $vehicle_id AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY received_at
SELECT received_at as time, roll FROM drone_states WHERE vehicle_id = $vehicle_id AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY received_at
SELECT received_at as time, pitch FROM drone_states WHERE vehicle_id = $vehicle_id AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY received_at
SELECT received_at as time, yaw FROM drone_states WHERE vehicle_id = $vehicle_id AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY received_at

SELECT received_at as time, AVG(linear_speed) as speed FROM drone_states WHERE vehicle_id = $vehicle_id AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 WEEK GROUP BY FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(received_at)/3600) ORDER BY received_at

SELECT received_at as time, AVG(battery_percentage) * 100 as battery FROM drone_states WHERE vehicle_id = $vehicle_id AND received_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 1 WEEK GROUP BY FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(received_at)/3600) ORDER BY received_at
